name: Ghost
description: A platform for creators to publish, grow, and monetize their content
compose:
name: slashnode-ghost
services:
  web:
    image: ghost:6.47.0
    container_name: web
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    user: '1000:1000'
    environment:
      database__client: mysql
      database__connection__host: ghost_db_1
      database__connection__user: root
      database__connection__password: umbrel
      database__connection__database: ghost
      url: http://${DEVICE_DOMAIN_NAME}:3368
      security__staffDeviceVerification: 'false'
    volumes:
      - web_data-content:/var/lib/ghost/content:rw
    ports:
      - 127.0.0.1:3368:2368
  db:
    image: mysql:8.4.4
    container_name: db
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    user: '1000:1000'
    environment:
      MYSQL_ROOT_PASSWORD: umbrel
    volumes:
      - db_data-db:/var/lib/mysql:rw
networks:
  slashnode:
    external: true
volumes:
  web_data-content:
    name: slashnode-ghost_web_data-content
  db_data-db:
    name: slashnode-ghost_db_data-db
notes: Auto-converted from getumbrel/umbrel-apps (ghost). Review before shipping. Upstream: https://ghost.org/.
